name: LinkedIn People & Company Enrichment API
description: Premium B2B intelligence API to extract person profiles (headline, experience, skills) and company data (description, industry, employees) from LinkedIn. Uses authenticated sessions and mobile proxies to bypass aggressive blocks.

pricing.comparison: Proxycurl charges $0.10-0.49 per profile. ZoomInfo costs $15k+/year. Our service provides high-trust mobile carrier data at a fraction of the cost via x402.

whyMobileProxy: LinkedIn uses the most aggressive anti-scraping in the industry. It specifically flags residential and datacenter IPs. Mobile carrier IPs are indistinguishable from legitimate app traffic, enabling reliable deep-profile extraction.
limitations: Requires valid session cookies in environment
Search results limited to top 10 per query
